name: Slack
author: Axon Team
description: OAuth2 "Sign in with Slack" (OpenID Connect). Registers an AUTH_PROVIDER using the platform's existing OAuth2 mechanics. Ships with no credentials; requires client_id/client_secret/redirect_uri from a Slack app.

client_id.description: Client ID from your Slack app's Basic Information page

client_secret.description: Client Secret from your Slack app's Basic Information page

redirect_uri.description: Registered redirect URL under Sign In With Slack
